title: Apple Just Bet Siri’s Future on Google AI
description:
Apple just made a quiet but massive AI decision.
After testing models from OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google, Apple chose Google’s Gemini to power the next version of Siri.
This isn’t a plugin. It’s foundational AI, launching later this year.
With Google already paying Apple ~$20B/year for search, reports now say Apple will pay Google ~$1B/year for Siri’s AI.

Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/
